manifest.seed_order: 1-byte seeds first, then 2-byte seeds, each bucket big-endian
manifest.match_rule: generated seed prefixes are compared directly against transformed raw target bytes
manifest.scope: pre-sidecar transformed match discovery only; not `.tlmr` transform metadata support

transform_manifest.name: xor-prev
transform_manifest.reason: byte residual transform from transform sweeps
